content.query:
IF OBJECT_ID('silver.sp_load_customers_inc', 'P') IS NOT NULL
    DROP PROCEDURE silver.sp_load_customers_inc;
GO

CREATE PROCEDURE silver.sp_load_customers_inc
    @load_run_id VARCHAR(100)
AS
BEGIN
    INSERT INTO silver.customers_inc
    (
        customer_id,
        customer_name,
        city,
        signup_date,
        created_at_utc,
        updated_at_utc,
        load_run_id
    )
    SELECT
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(b.customer_id)) AS INT),
        NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(b.customer_name)), ''),
        NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(b.city)), ''),
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(b.signup_date)) AS DATE),
        GETUTCDATE(),
        GETUTCDATE(),
        @load_run_id
    FROM bronze.customers b
    WHERE NOT EXISTS
    (
        SELECT 1
        FROM silver.customers_inc s
        WHERE s.customer_id = TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(b.customer_id)) AS INT)
    );
END;
GO


IF OBJECT_ID('silver.sp_load_products_inc', 'P') IS NOT NULL
    DROP PROCEDURE silver.sp_load_products_inc;
GO

CREATE PROCEDURE silver.sp_load_products_inc
    @load_run_id VARCHAR(100)
AS
BEGIN
    INSERT INTO silver.products_inc
    (
        product_id,
        product_name,
        category,
        unit_price,
        created_at_utc,
        updated_at_utc,
        load_run_id
    )
    SELECT
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(b.product_id)) AS INT),
        NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(b.product_name)), ''),
        NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(b.category)), ''),
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(b.unit_price)) AS DECIMAL(18,2)),
        GETUTCDATE(),
        GETUTCDATE(),
        @load_run_id
    FROM bronze.products b
    WHERE NOT EXISTS
    (
        SELECT 1
        FROM silver.products_inc s
        WHERE s.product_id = TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(b.product_id)) AS INT)
    );
END;
GO



IF OBJECT_ID('silver.sp_load_orders_inc', 'P') IS NOT NULL
    DROP PROCEDURE silver.sp_load_orders_inc;
GO

CREATE PROCEDURE silver.sp_load_orders_inc
    @load_run_id VARCHAR(100)
AS
BEGIN
    INSERT INTO silver.orders_inc
    (
        order_id,
        customer_id,
        product_id,
        quantity,
        order_date,
        created_at_utc,
        updated_at_utc,
        load_run_id
    )
    SELECT
        d.order_id,
        d.customer_id,
        d.product_id,
        d.quantity,
        d.order_date,
        GETUTCDATE(),
        GETUTCDATE(),
        @load_run_id
    FROM staging.orders_delta d
    WHERE NOT EXISTS
    (
        SELECT 1
        FROM silver.orders_inc s
        WHERE s.order_id = d.order_id
    );

    UPDATE config.WatermarkControl
    SET
        LastProcessedValue =
        (
            SELECT MAX(CAST(order_date AS DATETIME2))
            FROM staging.orders_delta
        ),
        LastRunId = @load_run_id,
        LastUpdatedAtUtc = GETUTCDATE()
    WHERE ProjectName = 'demo'
      AND LoadType = 'INCREMENTAL'
      AND TargetTable = 'orders'
      AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM staging.orders_delta);
END;
GO
